overall.description: First-person perspective walking along a narrow dirt trail through a dense forest at night. The scene is very dark with minimal ambient light, resembling a survival horror or exploration game environment. The camera moves steadily forward along the winding path, surrounded by trees and thick undergrowth.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow forest trail with dense vegetation on both sides

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dark forest trail, illuminated by a forward-facing light source

entered.detail: narrow winding dirt trail illuminated by the camera's light source
thick bushes and low vegetation lining the left side of the trail
prominent tree trunk leaning over the right side of the path
dense tree silhouettes forming a dark wall in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk along a narrow dirt trail through a dark forest at night. The path is illuminated by a light source, revealing dense undergrowth on the left and a distinctive leaning tree trunk on the right that grows progressively closer as the camera advances.

events.description: camera passes under low-hanging tree branches that temporarily obscure the upper portion of the view

agents.ego_description: continuing forward along the trail, passing underneath the overhanging branches of the tree

entered.detail: low-hanging leafy branches from the leaning tree that temporarily cover the path

segments.scene_description: The camera passes underneath the overhanging branches of the leaning tree, creating a brief moment of occlusion as leaves fill the foreground. After emerging from under the canopy, the trail continues ahead with the tree now behind, and the dense forest vegetation persists on both sides of the path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement along a dark forest trail that transitions from an open path to a brief moment of enclosure before returning to the open woods. It begins with a steady advance down a narrow dirt trail, where a light source reveals dense undergrowth and a distinctive leaning tree trunk that grows progressively closer on the right. As the camera moves forward, it passes directly underneath the overhanging branches of the tree, causing leaves to momentarily fill the foreground and occlude the view. The scene then opens back up as the camera emerges from under the canopy, leaving the leaning tree behind. Finally, the path continues ahead, flanked by persistent, thick forest vegetation under the cover of night.
